languages.text: "Это объясняет и скрытность Декабалуса, и его туманные ответы, Вольный Торговец. После слов командующей скитариями я начинаю думать, что это хорошо спланированный обман, который оказался под угрозой раскрытия — вот артизан и не придумал ничего лучше, чем объявить еретиком того, кто влез в его тайны. Старая, как мир, схема".

"That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."
languages.original_text: "Это объясняет и скрытность Декабалуса, и его туманные ответы, Вольный Торговец. После слов командующей скитариями я начинаю думать, что это хорошо спланированный обман, который оказался под угрозой раскрытия — вот артизан и не придумал ничего лучше, чем объявить еретиком того, кто влез в его тайны. Старая, как мир, схема".

traits.locale_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Lord Captain. After what the Skitarius's commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

"That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Lord Captain. After what the Skitarius commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

It's an age-old ploy."

It's an age-old ploy."

It's an age-old ploy."

"That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

languages.text: 「デカバルスの秘密主義と曖昧な答えが、アルファ・スキタリアスが言ったことによって説明がつきます。この計画は、暴露される危険性があった巧妙な偽装だったのかもしれません。そして、その秘密を詮索する者に対して、職人たちは異端の罪を付与したのです。古くからある策略ですね」
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Lord Captain. After what the Alpha-Skitarius said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

traits.locale_text: 「デカバルスの秘密主義と曖昧な答えが、アルファ・スキタリアスが言ったことによって説明がつきます。この計画は、暴露される危険性があった巧妙な偽装だったのかもしれません。そして、その秘密を詮索する者に対して、職人たちは異端の罪を付与したのです。古くからある策略ですね」

languages.text: “这样的话，德卡巴洛斯的讳莫如深和含糊其辞就都解释得通了，行商浪人。听完护教军指挥官的话，我越发觉得这是一场即将败露的精心骗局——所以这个匠人才恶人先告状，把异端罪名扣在打探他秘密的人头上。老把戏了。”
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

traits.locale_text: “这样的话，德卡巴洛斯的讳莫如深和含糊其辞就都解释得通了，行商浪人。听完护教军指挥官的话，我越发觉得这是一场即将败露的精心骗局——所以这个匠人才恶人先告状，把异端罪名扣在打探他秘密的人头上。老把戏了。”

languages.text: «Eso explica tanto el secretismo de Decabalus como sus respuestas ambiguas, Comerciante Independiente. Después de lo que dijo la comandante de los Skitarii, empiezo a creer que esto era un engaño premeditado que ha estado a punto de ser descubierto, y por eso el artesano decidió lanzar una acusación de herejía contra la persona que husmeaba donde no debía. Una estrategia clásica».
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

traits.locale_text: «Eso explica tanto el secretismo de Decabalus como sus respuestas ambiguas, Comerciante Independiente. Después de lo que dijo la comandante de los Skitarii, empiezo a creer que esto era un engaño premeditado que ha estado a punto de ser descubierto, y por eso el artesano decidió lanzar una acusación de herejía contra la persona que husmeaba donde no debía. Una estrategia clásica».

languages.text: "Das erklärt Decabalus' Geheimniskrämerei und seine vagen Antworten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Nach allem, was der Skitarii-Commander gesagt hat, gehe ich langsam von einer wohlgeplanten Täuschung aus, die aufgedeckt zu werden drohte ... also hielt es der Artifex für das Beste, die Person, die seinen Geheimnissen auf der Spur war, der Ketzerei zu bezichtigen. Ein Klassiker."
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

traits.locale_text: "Das erklärt Decabalus' Geheimniskrämerei und seine vagen Antworten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Nach allem, was der Skitarii-Commander gesagt hat, gehe ich langsam von einer wohlgeplanten Täuschung aus, die aufgedeckt zu werden drohte ... also hielt es der Artifex für das Beste, die Person, die seinen Geheimnissen auf der Spur war, der Ketzerei zu bezichtigen. Ein Klassiker."

languages.text: « Ça explique les non-dits et les réponses évasives de Décabalus, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les révélations de la commandante des Skitarii portent à croire qu'il s'agissait d'une tromperie solide qui risquait d'être révélée au grand jour. L'artisan s'est donc dit qu'il valait mieux faire accuser d'hérésie la personne qui fouinait dans ses secrets. Un stratagème vieux comme le monde. »
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

traits.locale_text: « Ça explique les non-dits et les réponses évasives de Décabalus, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les révélations de la commandante des Skitarii portent à croire qu'il s'agissait d'une tromperie solide qui risquait d'être révélée au grand jour. L'artisan s'est donc dit qu'il valait mieux faire accuser d'hérésie la personne qui fouinait dans ses secrets. Un stratagème vieux comme le monde. »

languages.text: "Bu hem Decabalus'un gizliliğini hem de kaçamak cevaplarını açıklıyor Hür Tacir. Skitariusların komutanının söylediklerinden sonra bunun açığa çıkma tehlikesi olan iyi planlanmış bir aldatmaca olduğunu düşünmeye başlıyorum. Bu yüzden Zanaatkâr, kâfirlik suçlamasını sırlarını kurcalayan kişiye yöneltmenin en iyisi olduğunu düşündü. Bu çok eski bir taktik."
languages.original_text: "That explains both Decabalus's secrecy and his vague answers, Rogue Trader. After what the Skitarii commander said, I'm beginning to think this was a well-planned deception that was in danger of being exposed — so the Artisan thought it best to cast the accusation of heresy against the person prying into his secrets. It's an age-old ploy."

Bu yüzden Zanaatkâr, kâfirlik suçlamasını sırlarını kurcalayan kişiye yöneltmenin en iyisi olduğunu düşündü. Bu çok eski bir taktik."
